# Version 3.119.2
> **Servicing and hardening** · Released February 6, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.2) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.2)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.2/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.3/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.2 hardens the Windows and Android native binaries and fills small API gaps on tvOS.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **Missing tvOS SKSurface overloads** — Adds the SKSurface.Create overloads that were present on iOS but missing on tvOS. — ❤️ [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) ([#3342](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3342))

## Platform

- **Android symbols preserved and packed** — The Android native symbols are preserved and shipped in the symbol package for better crash triage. ([#3374](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3374))

## Security

- **Windows binaries hardened** — Enables Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on the bundled Windows native DLLs to satisfy BinSkim BA2007 and related checks. — ❤️ [@Aguilex](https://github.com/Aguilex) ([#3397](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3397), [#3404](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3404))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.3

Picks up the Android symbol preservation and Windows hardening flags that also cover the HarfBuzzSharp binding. — ❤️ [@Aguilex](https://github.com/Aguilex) ([#3404](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3404), [#3397](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3397), [#3374](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3374))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) | Added the missing tvOS SKSurface.Create overloads. ([#3342](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3342)) |

## Preview 3 (February 5, 2026)

Preview 3 extended the Spectre-mitigation flag to the Linux native binary and cut the release candidate.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.2.3...v3.119.2-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (January 25, 2026)

Preview 2 enabled Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on the Windows native DLLs.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.1.2...v3.119.2-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (October 13, 2025)

Preview 1 collected the tvOS SKSurface fix, packed Android symbols, and improved the generator.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.1...v3.119.2-preview.1.2)
